user_query: For all days that don't have a dinner planned, add a cheap dinner option.

fields.name: Casual Budget Dinner – Pizza & Sandwiches
fields.description: Inexpensive, casual spot offering pizza by the slice, sandwiches and salads for a quick, satisfying meal before heading to the airport. Fast service and wallet-friendly portions.

insertion_point.reasoning: Day 10 had no dinner and the user's departure was pushed to 10:00 PM, so adding a cheap dinner at 6–7 PM placed at index 4 (before the 10:00 PM YYZ Departure) fits the available evening window after the 4:00 PM snack.
